description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:${GO_VERSION}-alpine Docker image, with a variable GO_VERSION defaulting to 1.22 and a before_script that installs git via apk, creates the Go workspace under /go/src/gitlab.com/gitlab-org, symlinks the repository, changes into it, and sets GOARCH=amd64, CGO_ENABLED=0, GOOS=linux. Define two stages, test and release. In the test stage add a static-analysis job that runs the script _support/go-fmt-check.sh, and a unit tests job that runs go test -v ./.... In the release stage add a binary job that runs in parallel for GO_VERSION values 1.22 and 1.23, executes go build -ldflags "-s -w" ./cmds/docker-distribution-pruner, and stores the resulting docker-distribution-pruner binary as an artifact.
